scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && cp index.html style.css dist/ && cp -R services realisations a-propos contact devis assets dist/
scripts.test:site: npm run build && node scripts/jfc-site-tests.js all
scripts.test:site:static: npm run build && node scripts/jfc-site-tests.js static
scripts.test:site:desktop: npm run build && node scripts/jfc-site-tests.js desktop-core
scripts.test:site:mobile: npm run build && node scripts/jfc-site-tests.js mobile-critical
scripts.test:site:visual-a11y: npm run build && node scripts/jfc-site-tests.js deployed-visual-a11y
scripts.test:site:lot2: npm run build && node scripts/jfc-site-tests.js lot2-visible-features
scripts.test:site:lot3: npm run build && node scripts/jfc-site-tests.js lot3-hardening
